note: All endpoints require Authorization: Bearer <token>. The authenticated user is excluded from search results — you will never see yourself.

endpoints.summary: Search registered users by name or email prefix (case-insensitive). Useful for finding users to invite to a room or start a DM. Returns at most 10 results.

q.description: Search term — matched as a prefix against both name and email. Minimum 3 characters.

200.description: Matching users (max 10). Password hash is never returned.

400.description: Query parameter 'q' is missing or shorter than 3 characters.
